evals.prompt: Grill me on our pricing strategy for this RFP.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG (clin, budget, period_of_performance, labor_category, incumbent), starts with contract type risk question using KG-extracted CLIN structure, provides recommended answer, one question at a time.

evals.prompt: Challenge our wrap rate assumptions — we're about to lock the price volume.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates with urgency signal, loads KG, focuses on questions 4 (wrap rates) and 5 (should-cost gap), pushes for defensible rate basis and explicit gap analysis, one question at a time.

evals.prompt: Stress-test our should-cost before we submit the price volume.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG (clin, budget, labor_category, workload_driver), grills through all 10 questions, synthesizes pricing risks and open intelligence needs at the end.
